name: Great Spirit
name_jp: グレート・スピリット
desc: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, you can flip this card into face-down Defense Position. When this card is Flip Summoned, you can switch the original ATK and DEF of 1 face-up EARTH monster on the field until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, you can flip this card into face-down Defense Position. When this card is Flip Summoned, you can switch the original ATK and DEF of 1 face-up EARTH monster on the field until the end of this turn.
